items.title: Irish police push back fuel protesters at oil refinery
items.dek: Demonstrations due to high prices caused by the US-Israeli war against Iran are affecting traffic on several roads.
items.body: Demonstrations due to high prices caused by the US-Israeli war against Iran are affecting traffic on several roads.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Still in shock, Beirut tries to heal after deadly Israeli attacks
items.dek: BBC Middle East Correspondent Hugo Bachega hears from people affected by this week's attacks.
items.body: BBC Middle East Correspondent Hugo Bachega hears from people affected by this week's attacks.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
items.dek: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.
items.body: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.
items.author: IriLine Desk
